scripts.start:x11: npm run build && env XDG_SESSION_TYPE=x11 electron . --ozone-platform=x11 --force-device-scale-factor=1 --disable-gpu
scripts.start:kde-x11: npm run build && env XDG_SESSION_TYPE=x11 electron . --ozone-platform=x11 --disable-gpu --reset-geometry --start-edit
scripts.start:payload: npm run build && env XDG_SESSION_TYPE=x11 OST_OVERLAY_PAYLOAD=../../captures/_derived/overlay.json electron . --ozone-platform=x11 --disable-gpu --reset-geometry --start-edit
scripts.start:live: npm run build && env XDG_SESSION_TYPE=x11 electron . --ozone-platform=x11 --disable-gpu --reset-geometry --start-edit
